title: TreeDefectCancellation
summary: States an abstract interface that turns the path-wise recurrence into cancellation of slot defects and hence tangentiality.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: States an abstract interface that turns the path-wise recurrence into cancellation of slot defects and hence tangentiality.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in PolyGJMSoperators/TreeDefectCancellation.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Data/interface: Operator Data. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: to Operator. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def toOperator {r k : ℕ} (D : OperatorData r k) (CalConf : Calculus Conf) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: to Operator apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem toOperator_apply {r k : ℕ} (D : OperatorData r k) (F : CalConf.MultiInput r) (U : Conf.AmbientBundle) : D.toOperator CalConf F U = ∑ I ∈ D.support, D.coeff I * I.toOperator CalConf F U

references.locator: Main ambient construction and tangentiality results
references.note: Motivation for rank-general nested Laplacian words; the Lean tree complex goes beyond what is currently instantiated.

limitations: This file establishes syntax, aggregate imports, or an abstract bridge. It must not be read as a derivation of the corresponding geometric theorem from concrete tensor and analytic data.
